themes: agentic AI at work & BI disruption

worthClicking.author: @emollick
worthClicking.why: New paper reruns the classic 146-economist dataset study with Claude Code and Codex — both land near human median but with far tighter variance, which is a concrete signal for agentic research quality.

worthClicking.author: @aakashgupta
worthClicking.why: Sharpest take on Claude Cowork threatening Tableau/Looker/Retool at $20/month — relevant for product strategy and pricing positioning.

worthClicking.author: @aakashgupta
worthClicking.why: Best-performing post in the feed (644K views) connecting Apple's Ternus succession to its AI lag — useful framing for enterprise AI adoption conversations.

worthClicking.author: @emollick
worthClicking.why: Mollick's direct observation that Kimi K2.6 over-indexes on benchmarks vs. real-world use is the clearest signal check on open-weights hype this cycle.

worthClicking.author: @levie
worthClicking.why: Aaron Levie makes the case that chatbot-to-agent transition requires dedicated internal automation owners — directly relevant to sales enablement and enterprise AI adoption pitches.

worthClicking.author: @aakashgupta
worthClicking.why: Concrete tally of Anthropic's compute locked up (5GW AWS + 3.5GW Google/Broadcom) since OpenAI's 'strategic misstep' jab — useful competitive context.

worthClicking.author: @aakashgupta
worthClicking.why: Lovable security breach (source code + DB credentials exposed via 5 API calls at $6.6B valuation) is the clearest vibe-coded app risk story to date — relevant for product strategy conversations.

worthClicking.author: @RoundtableSpace
worthClicking.why: 20-year-old builds $230K tracking solution overnight with $3 parts and Claude Code — the highest-signal indie dev distribution story in this batch.

voices.why: Consistently delivers grounded real-world model evaluations rather than benchmark theater — two high-quality posts here on Kimi and agentic research.
Produced the two highest-reach posts in the feed (Apple succession, Cowork/BI disruption) plus solid Lovable security and Anthropic compute takes — relevant across all three operator interests.
Enterprise-grade take on the chatbot-to-agent transition with real organizational implications, not hype.
